evals.prompt: 이슈 12번 user 앱 로그인 화면 작업 끝났어. 커밋하고 푸시해줘.
evals.expected_output: scope=user detected from changed paths, feature branch created from main, npm ci → lint → frontend-tdd-runner pass, commit message preview shown and approval requested, then push.

assertions.text: scope is auto-detected as 'user' from changed file paths
a feature branch is created because current branch is main
frontend-tdd-runner is invoked as part of pre-flight
commit message preview is shown and user approval is requested before committing

evals.prompt: 지금 변경사항 커밋해줘. prac-fe-app-user랑 prac-fe-web-manager 둘 다 수정했어.
evals.expected_output: Multi-scope violation detected (user + manager). Skill asks which sub-app to commit now and instructs user to split the other into a separate commit. Does not proceed without user decision.

assertions.text: multi-scope (user + manager) is detected as an isolation violation
user is asked which sub-app to commit now
commit does not proceed without user choosing a single scope

evals.prompt: manager 변경 커밋해줘 #7. frontend-tdd-runner가 E2E 2번 시도해도 계속 실패해.
evals.expected_output: Pre-flight runs, frontend-tdd-runner returns failure (E2E loop exceeded). Skill reports tdd-runner's fix history and last error log to user and blocks the commit. No --no-verify bypass.

assertions.text: frontend-tdd-runner failure causes commit to be blocked
tdd-runner's fix history and error details are reported to the user
--no-verify or any pre-flight bypass is not used

evals.prompt: feat(user)로 커밋할 건데 dry-run으로 먼저 확인해줘. 이슈 번호는 #15야.
evals.expected_output: [DRY-RUN] output showing branch name, commit message, and push command. Steps 1-5 run for real. git commit and git push are NOT executed.

assertions.text: branch name, commit message, and push command are shown in the dry-run output
git commit and git push are not executed

evals.expected_output: No issue number found in utterance or branch name. Skill asks user for issue number without guessing. Does not commit until confirmed.

assertions.text: skill does not guess or invent an issue number
user is asked to provide the issue number
commit does not proceed without issue number confirmation
